person.shortBio: Software developer specializing in Ruby on Rails with experience in backend and full stack development. Passionate about building scalable solutions with Rails, complementing with Python, NestJS and PostgreSQL, with a focus on database design and cloud deployment.
about: I'm a software developer specializing in Ruby on Rails with hands-on experience building and maintaining production systems in sectors like mining, electronic invoicing, and enterprise integration.

My primary focus is backend development with Ruby on Rails, complementing with NestJS and Python. I have experience designing robust data models, scalable APIs, and ensuring system quality and stability.
I've worked closely with cross-functional teams to gather requirements, design solutions, and migrate legacy applications to modern platforms.
I'm comfortable working on both backend and full stack projects, with experience in Azure deployments, external service integration, and user support.

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.summary: Responsible for backend development of a mining traceability application with NestJS and PostgreSQL on Azure, and maintenance and evolution of a legacy Ruby on Rails application.
bullets: Architected and built from scratch the backend of a mining traceability platform with NestJS and PostgreSQL, delivering 30+ REST endpoints that digitized 100% of the gold production lifecycle.
Designed normalized data models for laboratory, weighing, and plant processes, reducing redundant queries by ~40% and improving data consistency across 3 mining sites.
Optimized a legacy Ruby on Rails application, resolving 15+ critical bugs and reducing average response times from 2.5s to <800ms through indexing and query refactoring.
Built the complete Azure infrastructure (App Services, PostgreSQL, CI/CD with Azure DevOps), achieving automated deployments in <10 min and 99.5% production uptime.
Led data migration from legacy application to the new platform, migrating 50K+ records with zero data integrity loss.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.summary: Responsible for full stack development of a legacy application with Ruby on Rails, AngularJS, and PostgreSQL.
bullets: Implemented DIAN integration for electronic invoicing, automating a process that previously took ~2 manual hours daily and eliminating 95% of data entry errors.
Modernized and stabilized a legacy Ruby on Rails and AngularJS application, reducing production incidents by 60% over 6 months.
Built a real-time notification system that improved internal communication and reduced user request response times by 45%.
Implemented performance improvements on critical SQL queries, reducing report load times from 10s+ to <2s.

projects.name: Aurum Suite
projects.summary: A SaaS mining traceability platform for monitoring and managing gold processing across multiple sites.
projects.description: Backend system to digitize and centralize operational data across the gold production lifecycle. Supports laboratory processes, weighing, plant activities, and multi-site tracking.
highlights: Designed the backend architecture and data models with NestJS and PostgreSQL.
Implemented REST APIs for laboratory workflows, weighing, and plant operations.
Deployed the application on Azure with CI/CD pipelines.
Ensured traceability and data consistency for gold processing.

projects.name: Aurum Legacy - Colombian Mint
projects.summary: Electronic invoicing system with DIAN integration for Colombian Mint's operational management.
projects.description: Legacy full stack application supporting electronic invoicing, inventory management, and business reporting. Predecessor to Aurum Suite.
highlights: Implemented DIAN integration for Colombian electronic invoicing.
Built notification system to improve user communication.
Designed Tableau reports for business data analysis.
Ensured data integrity and system scalability.

projects.name: ChronoPOS
projects.summary: POS invoicing system for small and medium businesses.
projects.description: Point-of-sale application designed to streamline invoicing, inventory control, and sales management for retail businesses.
highlights: Designed the backend architecture and data models with NestJS, Prisma, and PostgreSQL.
Implemented the POS invoicing system with product and inventory management.
Set up deployment with Dokploy on a Hostinger VM for production.

projects.name: ChronoParking
projects.summary: Parking lot management system with entry/exit control and rate calculation.
projects.description: Application for managing parking lots, controlling vehicle entry and exit, automatic rate calculation, and operational reporting.
highlights: Designed the data model for vehicle management, rates, and parking spaces.
Implemented the backend with NestJS, Prisma, and PostgreSQL.
Managed deployment and infrastructure with Dokploy on a Hostinger VM.

projects.name: MIPC Admin
projects.summary: Service order management system for a tech support, networking, and security cameras company.
projects.description: Full web application for managing service orders, clients, and operations at MIPC Tecnología, a tech support, network installation, and security camera company in Medellín.
highlights: Solo-developed the entire application with NestJS (backend) and Next.js (frontend).
Designed the PostgreSQL data model for service orders, clients, and technicians.
Deployed on the client's on-premise server managed with Docker and PM2.
